title: Kadhal Nergayil Lyrics Nimirndhu Nil Song Lyrics
singerName: GV Prakash Kumar, Javed Ali, Shasha
stanzas:
Song: Kadhal Nergayil
Singer(s): Javed Ali, GV Prakash, Shasha
Lyrics : Kabilan
MOvie: Nimirndhu Nil
Music: GV Prakash

Kadhal Nergayil, mounam pesumn
kadhal parvayil, kangal koosum
Manal saalayil nadandhenadi
mazhai ootrinaai uyire.
Madhil ponnayaai irundhenadi
ennai maatrinaai uyire.

Nee yaaro, nee yaaro
nee thaan en yevaalo.
Kadhal Nergayil, mounam pesum
kadhal parvayil, kangal koosum

Oondhal vinai nee, koyil yaanai naan.
Undhan kangalaal oorai paarkiren.
Paaraipola vazhandha naaney
sirpam aagiren.
Paadhi dhooram pona pinney
paadhai kaangiren.

Kadhal Nergayil, mounam pesum
kadhal parvayil, kangal koosum
Manal saalayil nadandhenadi
mazhai ootrinaai uyire.
Madhil ponnayaai irundhenadi
ennai maatrinaai uyire.

Nee yaaro, nee yaaro
nee endhan aadhaamo.
Thaedi paarkiren ennai naaney.
pedhai yaavumey neeyaai aanen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Nergayil?

The song revolves around the themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

Who are the singers of Kadhal Nergayil?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar, Javed Ali, and Shasha.

Who composed the music for Nimirndhu Nil?

The music for the movie was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

What is the release year of Nimirndhu Nil?

The movie was released in the year 2013.

What emotions does Kadhal Nergayil evoke?

The song evokes feelings of romance and tranquility, perfect for moments of reflection and love.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kadhal Nergayil from Nimirndhu Nil is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar, Javed Ali, and Shasha, the song's soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics convey deep emotions of affection and connection. The music, composed by GV Prakash Kumar, enhances the romantic atmosphere, making it ideal for intimate moments. This song is a perfect choice for those in love, evoking a sense of warmth and tranquility.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kadhal Nergayil from the movie Nimirndhu Nil. This romantic duet, brought to life by the soulful voices of GV Prakash Kumar, Javed Ali, and Shasha, captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the soothing tunes crafted by GV Prakash Kumar that will leave you mesmerized.
stanzaMeanings: In the path of love, silence speaks. In the gaze of love, eyes shy away. I walked on the sandy path, you poured rain on me, my life. I was like a golden wall, you changed me, my life.
Who are you, who are you, you are my everything. In the path of love, silence speaks. In the gaze of love, eyes shy away.
You are the cause of my troubles, I am like a temple elephant. Through your eyes, I see the world. I lived like a rock, now I am a sculpture. After going halfway, I see the path.
Because of you, because of you, my search is because of you.
In the path of love, silence speaks. In the gaze of love, eyes shy away. I walked on the sandy path, you poured rain on me, my life. I was like a golden wall, you changed me, my life.
Who are you, who are you, you are my soul. I search and see myself. I became everything childish because of you.
